Kung Fu Panda is a 2008 animated film produced by DreamWorks Animation. It is one of [[Eric Weinstein]]'s favorite movies because of its treatment of self-teaching. Eric wrote an essay on the topic of self-teaching inspired by Kung Fu Panda, which you can read on [https://qr.ae/pN3LV0 Quora]. 

== See Also ==

* [[Genius vs Excellence]]
* [[Skadoosh]]
* [[There is no secret ingredient]]
* [[The War on Excellence]]

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Education]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
